sql: SELECT p.URUN_KODU, SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID AND f.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID = p.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') = '2025' GROUP BY p.URUN_KODU ORDER BY TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Groups and sums BRUT_PRIM_TL by URUN_KODU for the year 2025 based on EK_TANZIM_TARIHI.
risk_notes: Relies on correct join paths and assumes BRUT_PRIM_TL is the correct metric for production.
description:
Question answered: Retrieves top 10 total premium production by product code for 2025 using year extraction from date.
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH
Filters: Year extracted from TARIH column equals '2025'
Grouping/measures: Groups by URUN_KODU, sums BRUT_PRIM_TL as TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI
Expected output columns: URUN_KODU, TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI
Assumptions: BRUT_PRIM_TL is the correct measure for premium production.

sql: SELECT p.URUN_KODU, SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID AND f.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID = p.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE t.TARIH BETWEEN TO_DATE('2025-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2025-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY p.URUN_KODU ORDER BY TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Groups and sums BRUT_PRIM_TL by URUN_KODU for the full year of 2025 using explicit date range.
risk_notes: Uses explicit date range which may be redundant with TO_CHAR filter but ensures clarity.
description:
Question answered: Retrieves top 10 total premium production by product code for the full year of 2025 using explicit date range.
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH
Filters: TARIH between '2025-01-01' and '2025-12-31'
Grouping/measures: Groups by URUN_KODU, sums BRUT_PRIM_TL as TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI
Expected output columns: URUN_KODU, TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI
Assumptions: BRUT_PRIM_TL is the correct measure for premium production.

sql: SELECT p.URUN_KODU, SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID AND f.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID = p.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') = '2025' GROUP BY p.URUN_KODU HAVING SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) > 0 ORDER BY TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Groups and sums BRUT_PRIM_TL by URUN_KODU for 2025, filtering out zero values.
risk_notes: Includes HAVING clause to exclude zero production entries, ensuring meaningful results.
description:
Question answered: Retrieves top 10 total premium production by product code for 2025, filtering out zero production entries.
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH
Filters: Year extracted from TARIH column equals '2025'
Grouping/measures: Groups by URUN_KODU, sums BRUT_PRIM_TL as TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI
Expected output columns: URUN_KODU, TOPLAM_PRIM_TUTARI
Assumptions: BRUT_PRIM_TL is the correct measure for premium production, and zero production entries are irrelevant.
